heading: Lump-sum allowances for House Minority Leader and Majority Whip
label: 5144 Lump-sum allowances for House Minority Leader and Majority Whip
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74a–10 of this titleSection is from the 1999 Emergency Supplemental Appropriations Act.

children.label: a
children.text: The aggregate amount otherwise authorized to be appropriated for a fiscal year for the lump-sum allowance for the Office of the Minority Leader of the House of Representatives and the aggregate amount otherwise authorized to be appropriated for a fiscal year for the lump-sum allowance for the Office of the Majority Whip of the House of Representatives shall each be increased by $333,000.

children.label: b
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2000 and each succeeding fiscal year.
